name: Do I need a lawyer for my occupational disease claim or can I handle it myself?
description: Yes, for better odds and value; contingency basis[1][3].

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for my occupational disease claim or can I handle it myself?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, for better odds and value; contingency basis[1][3].
acceptedAnswer.description:
Strongly recommended; insurers deny 40%+ initially.

Complex proof burdens trip self-reps; appeals need expertise[3].

- Lawyers boost settlements 2-3x.
- No upfront fees (contingency).
- Handle filings, negotiations.

Most win more with counsel; initial review free.
